notes: IFS 1.0.19 - fixes the Serial Monitor going blank / UI options not responding: the Tip Charger and Puretip live streams now open only while their tab is visible, so the always-on Opta monitor stream is never starved by the browser's connection limit; SSE replay is capped so subscribing never floods. Errors now auto-clear (banner ~12s, last-fault ~30s). Clearer post-flash prompt (press the Opta RESET once if it doesn't auto-reconnect). Signed (Augeas Technologies).
